text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: It's the day before the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Phew.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah. My legs feel nice and light.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(Seems like the regimen Trainer's put<n>together is
doing me good. Probably.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (I could do without all the damn<n>nagging, though.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: All right, all that's left is a quick<n>cooldown and...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Scratch that. I think I'm overdue for a<n>visit to my
favorite spot.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(This place is always so peaceful... It<n>never fails to
calm me down.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(Maybe 'cause no one's here. All<n>people ever do
is make fun of me.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(Short, spineless, and weak they'd<n>say. Not a
single redeeming feature.<n>Like I was practically
wearing a sign<n>telling people to bully me.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(It doesn't even matter if I'm on the<n>turf or not. No
one lets me just live<n>my life.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(Enough about that. They can go<n>ahead and say
whatever they want.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(I'll make them eat their words once<n>they see
what I'm capable of.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I should head home and take a break.<n>I'll need the
rest so I can win<n>tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (No... I will win. I have to.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(The only way I can get people to<n>respect me is
through racing!)
Um, excuse me...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A voice suddenly calls out to Narita<n>Taishin, and
she spins around in<n>surprise.

text_block_list.name: Red-haired Girl
text_block_list.text:
You're Narita Taishin, right? The one<n>running in all
those races...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A redheaded girl, as small as Narita<n>Taishin,
stands before her.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah, what of it?

text_block_list.name: Red-haired Girl
text_block_list.text:
The G1 race tomorrow... What's it<n>called again?
The Satsuki Sho?<n>You're running in it, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Red-haired Girl
text_block_list.text:
You're still doing it even though the<n>top two are
going to be there. And<n>they're stronger and have
better<n>physiques.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Excuse you? What are you getting<n>at?

text_block_list.name: Red-haired Girl
text_block_list.text: Nothing. I'm just stating the obvious.

text_block_list.name: Red-haired Girl
text_block_list.text:
I mean, come on! No one's rooting for<n>you! No one
thinks you can win!

text_block_list.name: Red-haired Girl
text_block_list.text:
Doesn't that make you want to give<n>up? Most
people would...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Not really?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: No one's ever expected me to win.<n>Not even once.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I just want to make everyone regret<n>how they've
treated me. Everyone<n>else has a "dream" or
whatever, but<n>me? Mine's practically revenge.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
But who cares? Even if I'm being<n>driven by petty
revenge, why should I<n>give up on my goal?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to see this through. I'm<n>going to show
them what I can do.<n>That's it.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The red-haired girl bites her lip, glares<n>at Narita
Taishin, and runs off. Her<n>legs are wrapped tightly
in braces<n>meant for sports.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: The next day...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'm going to win. I have to.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin's fighting spirit is<n>burning fiercely.
She's ready.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Here I go.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Ticket! Let's see that amazing final<n>dash of yours
today!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Biwa Hayahide! I came to see you<n>wiiiin!

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Can you hear that, folks? Just the<n>sight of them is
making the crowd go<n>wild!

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
This is it. Everyone at the Satsuki Sho<n>has their
eyes on the showdown<n>between the top two,
Winning Ticket<n>and Biwa Hayahide!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Listen to those idiots making a huge<n>fuss over
nothing...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Well, I'll show them all what I'mmade of!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Are you feeling it too, Ticket?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I'm all jittery and tingly!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
They call us the top two, but we know<n>better than
anyone that that's not<n>accurate.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Taishin! I'm not gonna lose! I'm<n>gonna give it all
I've got!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: And thus begins the Satsuki Sho!
